positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a joyful woodland animal family—a father deer, mother doe, and two playful fawn cubs—emerging from a stylized, swirling cluster of iridescent autumn leaves and wildflowers. The style is modern boho-folk, combining intricate linework with flat, saturated color fields. The composition features the subjects centrally, creating a clean silhouette against a subtle, gradient background of warm cream and sage green. Use strong, defined outlines (like woodcut or screen-print style). Emphasis on clean edges, negative space, and harmonious color blocking. Perfect for a T-shirt print, high contrast, vector aesthetic, highly detailed, storybook quality.
negative: blurry, sketch, watermark, logo, text, messy, noise, artifact, gradient background, low detail, photorealism, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain
